title: node-postgres Pool, Client Ownership, Transactions, and Shutdown · Retrieval Circuit
summary: A delayed incident review reconstructs node-postgres pool, client ownership, transactions, and shutdown from source and emitted revision, tenant, URL, validator, bytes, runtime validation, Promise settlement, transaction, lease, response, failure, handle cleanup, and recovery evidence. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for bounded pg repository and transaction port after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debug…
objectives: Create one bounded Pool, handle background errors, observe acquire waits, reject work during closure, and await pool.end after workers settle.
Release every successfully acquired client in finally, preserve the original error, and test error, cancellation, and shutdown paths.
Run BEGIN, every statement, COMMIT or ROLLBACK on the same checked-out client and prohibit pool.query inside the unit of work.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Feed aggregation and TypeScript Separate evidence from confidence · Review Feed Ts Postgres Error P…
steps.instruction:
review case — A review TypeScript team handles case 6987 during a clean emitted-package and restore smoke. Build deterministic TypeScript evidence to prove Pool, checked-out client, transaction connection, row validation, error, and close ownership; every Promise, AbortSignal listener, timer, stream, pool client, transaction, lease, and handle needs an owner; then change one PostgreSQL constraint, transaction, migration, upsert, query, or search plan and preserve admitted state. Browser TypeScript uses pure bounded models and original RSS, Atom, HTTP, PostgreSQL, and reader fixtures only. Real DNS, Fetch, streams, fast-xml-parser, Express, PostgreSQL, processes, signals, handle and load claims, containers, accessibility review, backups, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Narrow unknown errors into constraint, serialization, deadlock, timeout, cancel, connection, and unknown causes without message matching or leakage.

Inspect the Feed Ts Postgres Error Policy trace for this review case. Which record connects a precondition, observed state change, and boundary result?

content.text: A review TypeScript team handles case 7333 during a PostgreSQL lease and migration fault exercise. Build deterministic TypeScript evidence to prove Pool, checked-out client, transaction connection, row validation, error, and close ownership; browser TypeScript must remain deterministic and free of Node, network, database, and host effects; then change one tenant, cursor, reader command, authorization, validator, sanitizer, or accessibility condition without leaking state. Browser TypeScript uses pure bounded models and original RSS, Atom, HTTP, PostgreSQL, and reader fixtures only. Real DNS, Fetch, streams, fast-xml-parser, Express, PostgreSQL, processes, signals, handle and load claims, containers, accessibility review, backups, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Create one bounded Pool, handle background errors, observe acquire waits, reject work during closure, and await pool.end after workers settle.
